narrative_votes: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
URW: Negative Consequences for the West

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: तीसरा विश्व युद्ध छिड़ा तो 3 टुकड़ों में बंट जाएगी दुनिया!
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text evokes fear and anxiety about the potential consequences of a third world war, suggesting that it could lead to the division of the world into three parts.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: जल्दी युद्धविराम न हो, तो दोनों देशों की आग पूरी दुनिया में फैल जाएगी और चाहे-अनचाहे हर कोई युद्ध का हिस्सा होगा.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text speculates about the potential outcomes of the war, suggesting that it could spread to the entire world and involve many countries.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: कोविड वैक्सीन का असमान बंटवारा भी बनेगा वजह
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text criticizes the Western countries, particularly the United States, for their handling of the COVID-19 vaccine distribution, suggesting that it has led to a lack of trust among weaker nations.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: बड़े इंटरनेशनल संगठन, जो आमतौर पर शांति की बात करते हैं, वे कमजोर हो जाएंगे.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text suggests that the Western-led international organizations will become weaker and less effective in maintaining peace, implying negative consequences for the West.

narrative_votes_with_evidence.narrative_name: URW: Negative Consequences for the West
narrative_votes_with_evidence.evidence_quote: वहीं एक तीसरा पाला भी होगा. इसमें कुछ ऐसे देश शामिल होंगे, जिनका दोनों ही खेमों से कुछ न कुछ वास्ता है और जो जंग नहीं चाहते हुए भी उसका हिस्सा बन चुके होंगे.
narrative_votes_with_evidence.reasoning: The text suggests that the Western countries may face negative consequences, such as being drawn into a war despite not wanting to be involved, and that a third group of countries may emerge that is not aligned with either side.
